title: elytrigia repens subsp. lolioides
intro: Elytrigia repens subsp. lolioides, also known as crested wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Elytrigia repens subsp. lolioides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
